text: UK passes bill that will eventually ban cigarette purchases - AP News
fullText: Parliament has passed a bill to make cigarettes inaccessible to future generations in the U.K. Children born after Dec. 31, 2008, will never be able to buy cigarettes under the new Tobacco and Vapes Bill. The legislation, approved Tuesday, awaits formal appro…

text: Flyers crush Penguins, 5-2, in Philly's grand welcome back to the playoffs - PhillyVoice
fullText: The Flyers are up 3-0 over Pittsburgh. They're good again. They're worth believing in again, and Philadelphia came ready to blow the roof off the place over it.

text: Senate begins "vote-a-rama" as GOP moves forward with funding ICE without Democrats - CBS News
fullText: The Senate is beginning what's expected to be a marathon vote series on Wednesday, as Republicans move ahead with a plan to fund immigration agencies under the Department of Homeland Security without help from Democrats.

text: Iran fires on 2 ships in Strait of Hormuz after Trump extends ceasefire - Fox News
fullText: Iran attacked two vessels in the Strait of Hormuz on Wednesday after President Donald Trump extended a U.S. ceasefire in the region, allowing Tehran more time to present a "unified proposal."

text: Chemical leak at a W.Va. plant kills 2 people, sends 30 more to hospitals, officials say - NPR
fullText: The leak occurred at the Catalyst Refiners plant, a silver recovery business. An emergency management official says workers were preparing to shut down at least part of the facility when the leak occurred, causing a chemical gas reaction.

text: Daniel Jeremiah's final 2026 NFL mock draft: Eagles, Saints among 4 teams to trade up - NFL.com
fullText: In his final mock of the 2026 NFL Draft, Daniel Jeremiah forecasts four trades, with the Eagles and Saints among the teams moving up. Check out the full first-round projection, 1-32.

text: 'Storage Wars' star Darrell Sheets found dead at 67 in Arizona home - USA Today
fullText: Police in Lake Havasu City, Arizona found "Storage Wars" star Darrell Sheets dead from what appeared to be a self-inflicted gunshot wound.

text: Inside the Massachusetts courtroom where former students face a teacher charged with rape - NBC News

text: Judge blocks Virginia from using new congressional maps, 1 day after redistricting vote passes - CBS News
fullText: A state court judge on Wednesday blocked Virginia from moving forward with a redistricting effort that passed a day earlier, a roadblock in Democrats' efforts to redraw the state's congressional maps.
